summary: Documented the safe qd worktree report-path recording pattern so qd runs keep repo-relative report paths instead of recording .qd/worktrees paths.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: docs/QD_WORKFLOW.md documents that qd complete, audit pass, verification sign-off, and CI evidence paths must remain repo-relative and must not point into .qd/worktrees.

Docs describe the safe worktree pattern: record qd state from a checkout where reports/evidence are visible at repo-relative paths, then export qd state from the qd root into the worktree roadmap file.
No qd behavior changes and no historical evidence or report rewrites.
Evidence and qd reports are recorded under evidence/m4-qd-worktree-report-path-doc-sync and reports/qd/m4-qd-worktree-report-path-doc-sync.
git diff --check, just qd-reports-check, and nix develop -c just check pass.
No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, latency, Mac hardware, workflow dispatch, or credential-dependent claim is made.

commandsRun.command: rg -n "worktree branch|repo-relative|\.qd/worktrees|qd complete --from-report|qd audit pass --from-report|qd verification sign-off|qd ci record-pass" docs/QD_WORKFLOW.md docs/ORCHESTRATION.md

realWorldValidation.evidence: This is a qd workflow documentation alignment node and does not require product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, latency, Mac hardware, workflow dispatch, or credential-dependent validation.
